name: Wild Green Salad
recipeIngredient: Curly endive leaves (the inner white ones)
Hearts of romaine lettuce or a mixture
Dill or fennel greens and blossoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry all the greens.
2. Tear or cut them into your desired size and place them in a large bowl with the scallions and toasted sunflower seeds.
3. Pour over the dressing (recipe follows) and toss well.
Dressing:
Whisk together plain or herbal vinegar, such as tarragon vinegar, salt, sunflower seed oil, extra-virgin olive oil, and walnut oil. Taste and adjust with more vinegar or oil as needed.
